name: defi-health-monitor
description: Real-time DeFi protocol health monitoring with multi-chain risk scoring

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:engine" "npm run dev:scanner" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:scanner: cd src/scanner && go run main.go scan
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:scanner
scripts.test: npm run test:engine && npm run test:scanner && npm run test:web
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:engine
scripts.db:migrate: cd src/db && for f in migrations/*.sql; do psql -f "$f"; done
